description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge display on the front, featuring minimal bezels and a centered punch-hole front camera. The back is sleek and smooth, finished in a light gray color, and houses a vertically aligned triple camera array in the top left corner, accompanied by a small flash. The sides are slim and metallic, with subtle button placements visible along the right edge. The device appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal, giving it a premium and durable feel. The front screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with blue, green, and purple hues, and no visible icons or notifications. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for use in any urban environment.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display, triple rear cameras, and a light gray finish. The front features a vibrant abstract wallpaper and minimal bezels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display with a colorful abstract wallpaper and a centered punch-hole camera at the top.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slim metallic edge and the slight protrusion of the rear camera module.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the light gray finish, vertically aligned triple camera array in the top left, and subtle branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slimness and metallic edge, with no visible buttons or ports.
attribute_brand_logo: Embossed text logo centered on the back, subtle and matching the gray color of the rear surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with blue, green, and purple brushstroke patterns; no icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Triple camera array vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back, with a small flash module adjacent to the cameras.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the right edge, likely including a power button and volume rocker, slim and elongated in shape.
